
EXAMPLES FOR CHAPTER 7 - "Arcs and Curves".

The examples for this chapter require 51 KB.
			
Files contained in this folder:				
	Manifest
	arc.ps
	arct.ps (*)
	arcto1.ps
	arcto2.ps
	arcto3.ps
	arcto4.ps
	arcto5.ps
	bigarcs1.ps
	bigarcs2.ps (1)
	bigarcs3.ps
	circle1.ps
	circle2.ps
	clock1.ps
	clock2.ps
	clock3.ps
	clock4.ps
	clock5.ps (*)
	clock6.ps (*)
	curveto1.ps
	curveto2.ps
	curveto3.ps
	curveto4.ps
	cusp1.ps
	cusp2.ps
	cusp3.ps
	family.ps
	heart1.ps
	heart2.ps
	hull.ps (2)
	pacman.ps
	piechart.ps
	rcurveto.ps
	spots1.ps
	spots2.ps
	spots3.ps
	vary1.ps
	vary2.ps
	vary3.ps
	vary4.ps
	vary5.ps
	vary6.ps

(*)	Requires PostScript Level 2.

(1)	The lines reading
		4.25 inch 5.5			%  coordinates of center
		inch 3				%  radius
	in the book, should have read
		4.25 inch 5.5 inch		%  coordinates of center
		3 inch				%  radius
	This has been fixed on this disk.

(2)	The points listed in the book are incorrect. They are:
		/P0 { 3.0 inch 2.0 inch } def		%  first end point
		/P1 { 7.5 inch 6.0 inch } def		%  first control point
		/P2 { 1.0 inch 7.0 inch } def		%  2nd control point
		/P3 { 7.0 inch 2.0 inch } def		%  2nd end point

	The example contains the correct points which are
		/P0 { 2.0 inch 1.0 inch } def		%  first end point
		/P1 { 1.0 inch 7.0 inch } def		%  first control point
		/P2 { 7.5 inch 7.0 inch } def		%  2nd control point
		/P3 { 6.5 inch 2.0 inch } def		%  2nd end point
